name: Uncaught Throw
description: Throw statement not inside a try/catch. Creates a caller obligation to handle the exception.
smt2Template:
(declare-const exception_thrown Int)
(declare-const caller_catches Int)
(assert (= exception_thrown 1))
(assert (= caller_catches 0))
(check-sat)

teachingExample.explanation: assertPositive throws but caller has no try/catch
teachingExample.smt2:
(declare-const input_invalid Int)
(declare-const caught Int)
(assert (= input_invalid 1))
(assert (= caught 0))
(check-sat)
